calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-17-2021 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Attorneys Fees Re Defendants Special Motion To Strike Complaint Pursuant To Ccp 425.16 Antislapp Prevailing Party In Breach Of Contract Action
Off Calendar Feb-01-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. KARL S. KRONENBERGER, Esq. of Kronenberger Rosenfeld, LLP (Tel: 415-955-1155) for Defendant Milla Vayntrub;
No other appearances made in this case.

Hearing Re: Defendant Milla Vayntrub's Motion For Attorneys' Fees Re Defendant's Special Motion To Strike Complaint Pursuant To CCP 425.16 Anti-SLAPP Prevailing Party In Breach Of Contract Action.

Defense counsel communicates to the Court information re: plaintiff's counsel Ms. Tour-Sarkissian's absence at today's hearing.

There being no timely opposition filed by plaintiff, there being no timely request made for a continuance, and there being no appearance today by or for plaintiff, the Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Motion granted in the requested amounts of $48,571.85 and $4,038.15, for a total of $52,610.00. No opposition filed.

Order signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Rose Miller, CSR No. 5041, email: RMillerCSR@gmail.com (302/EPS)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-15-2020 Continued To Mar-03-21 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-05-2020 Continued To Dec-29-20 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Nov-06-2020 Off Calendar

Defendant Milla Vayntrubs Notice Of Motion And Special Motion To Strike Complaint Pursuant To Ccp 425.16 Antislapp
Off Calendar Nov-06-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances by ZOOM Video-conferencing:
Attorney, Phil Foster of Tour-Sarkissian Law Offices (email: phil@tslo.com) appears as counsel for plaintiff/opposing party

Attorney, Karl S. Kronenberger of the law offices of Kronenberger Rosenfeld LLP (karl@KRInternetLaw.com) appears as counsel for defendant/moving party

The cause is argued and submitted by both sides, on record as reflected in the notes of the certified shorthand reporter.

DEFENDANT MILLA VAYNTRUB'S Special Motion To Strike Complaint Pursuant To Ccp Section 425.16 Antislapp is GRANTED.

Written order is signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: J. Rios Merida; Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR No. 8600, email: maria.torreano@gmail.com
